assumptions: 'Eating out every day' = one 3-course dinner per day at a good mid-to-upper restaurant, 30 days/month (mealPrice x 30). 'A trip' = one nice ~6-night Mediterranean holiday for one person (round-trip flight + 4-star solo room + spending); divide an annual budget by tripCost for trips/year.

sources: https://www.numbeo.com/cost-of-living/in/Tallinn (updated 2026-06; 3-course meal for 2 = EUR 80 -> EUR 40/person; city-centre 1-bed avg EUR 709; Basic Utilities for 85m2 = EUR 285.14/mo; Internet 60Mbps+ = EUR 28.97/mo)

https://www.ey.com/en_ee/insights/tax/significant-tax-changes-in-estonia-in-2025-2026 + https://www.emta.ee/en/private-client/taxes-and-payment/declaration-income/tax-rates (Estonia flat personal income tax incl. capital gains/investment income = 22% from 1 Jan 2025, up from 20%; as of 2025/2026)
https://investropa.com/blogs/news/tallinn-rents (early 2026; premium central/furnished 1-2BR EUR 1200-1500)
https://kadriorgapartments.ee (Kadriorg multi-room from EUR 1300)
city24.ee / kv.ee Tallinn rental market (Old Town & Kadriorg 60-90 m2 luxury 800-1700/mo)
https://bryanestates.ee + investropa.com (Kadriorg = top prestige residential district, 2025)
airbaltic.com flight deals (TLL-Malaga/Barcelona RT ~EUR 260-320) + booking.com 4-star Barcelona ~EUR 150/night
EE.confidence: District HIGH (Old Town close runner-up). Meal HIGH (Numbeo-anchored). Rent MEDIUM-HIGH, luxury band EUR 800-1700, point 1300 from secondary sources not live scrapes. Trip MEDIUM, range EUR 1200-1800, season/destination-sensitive.

sources: https://www.numbeo.com/cost-of-living/in/Riga (updated 2026-06; 3-course meal for 2 = EUR 60 -> EUR 30/person; city-centre 1-bed avg EUR 528; Basic Utilities for 85m2 = EUR 319.49/mo, range 250-500; Internet 60Mbps+ = EUR 17.55/mo)

https://taxsummaries.pwc.com/latvia/individual/income-determination (Latvia capital gains/capital income standard PIT = 25.5% from 2025; transitional 20% rate applies 2025-2027 to assets held/initiated before 31 Dec 2024 - used 0.20 as representative resident rate; +3% surcharge above EUR 200k income)
https://www.ss.com/en/real-estate/flats/riga/centre/hand_over/ (Quiet Centre / centre rentals)
https://www.city24.lv/en/real-estate/apartments-for-rent/riga-centrs-elizabetes-iela (restored Art Nouveau 61.5 m2 EUR 1476)
https://investropa.com/blogs/news/riga-rents (Jan 2026; premium 2BR EUR 1100-1600+)
https://neighborhood.lv/en/real-estate/myths-and-truths-about-living-in-the-rigas-quiet-center/ (Klusais centrs = top prestige Art Nouveau embassy district; Vecriga/Old Town alternative)
airbaltic.com (RIX-Barcelona RT ~EUR 274-300) + booking.com 4-star + Spain INE 4-star ADR EUR 130-240/night
LV.confidence: District HIGH (canonical prestige district; Old Town alternative). Meal HIGH (Numbeo-anchored). Rent MEDIUM, luxury band EUR 630-1500+, prestige tier priced by heritage fit-out more than m2; a distinct 'premium 2BR' line would be ~EUR 1500. Trip MEDIUM-HIGH, range EUR 1200-1800.

sources: https://www.numbeo.com/cost-of-living/in/Vilnius (updated 2026-06; 3-course meal for 2 = EUR 65 -> ~EUR 32/person, used 30; city-centre 1-bed avg EUR 766; Basic Utilities for 85m2 = EUR 199.12/mo; Internet 60Mbps+ = EUR 17.51/mo)

https://taxsummaries.pwc.com/lithuania/individual/income-determination (Lithuania GPM on dividends = flat 15%; capital gains taxed 15% up to EUR 253,065/yr, 20% above - used 0.15 as representative resident rate; 2025. 2026 reform makes employment income progressive but dividends/certain capital gains stay flat 15%)
https://www.domoplius.lt (Old Town 2-room 57 m2 EUR 1200; 3-room 99 m2 EUR 1500; central 60-90 m2 at 20-30 EUR/m2)
https://investropa.com/blogs/news/vilnius (2026; high-end 2-bed Senamiestis/Zverynas EUR 1100-1700/mo)
Global Property Guide / Investropa (Senamiestis, Zverynas, Uzupis = top neighbourhoods ~EUR 3800-6500/m2)
Ryanair/Wizz/Kiwi.com (VNO-Barcelona RT ~EUR 180-260) + booking.com 4-star + INE Spain 4-star ADR (Aug 2025 EUR 163.8/night)
LT.confidence: District HIGH (Senamiestis = single most prestigious central address; Zverynas co-prestige villa district). Meal HIGH (Numbeo-anchored, slightly conservative vs EUR 32). Rent HIGH for the EUR 1100-1700 band, point 1350. Trip MEDIUM-HIGH, range EUR 1200-1800; aruodas.lt/kampas.lt blocked automated fetch so rent leans on domoplius live listings + secondaries.
